mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p014_user (ID, PW, NAME, PHONE_NO, ROLE_TYPE) VALUES (#{ID}, #{PW}, #{NAME}, #{PHONE_NO}, #{ROLE_TYPE})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_user WHERE ID = #{strID}

SELECT u.ID, u.PW, u.NAME, u.PHONE_NO, u.ROLE_TYPE, u.GYM_CODE, u.PROFILE_PATH, g.STATUS_CODE AS GYM_STATUS, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_notification WHERE USER_ID = #{ID} AND IS_READ = 'N' ) AS NOTI_COUNT FROM p014_user u LEFT JOIN p014_gym g ON u.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE WHERE u.ID = #{ID} AND u.PW = #{PW}
SELECT GYM_CODE, GYM_NAME, ADDRESS, IMG_PATH FROM p014_gym WHERE STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT m.MARKET_NO, m.TITLE, m.PRICE, DATE_FORMAT(m.START_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS START_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(m.END_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS END_DATE, g.GYM_NAME, g.ADDRESS FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE WHERE m.STATUS_CODE = 'SALE' ORDER BY m.UPLOAD_DATE DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT g.GYM_CODE, g.GYM_NAME, g.ADDRESS, g.TEL_NO, g.IMG_PATH, COUNT(f.ID) AS FAVORITES_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_gym_favorites fav WHERE fav.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE AND fav.ID = #{ID} ) AS IS_FAVORITE FROM p014_gym g LEFT JOIN p014_gym_favorites f ON g.GYM_CODE = f.GYM_CODE
g.STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE'
AND (g.GYM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR g.ADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
GROUP BY g.GYM_CODE, g.GYM_NAME, g.ADDRESS, g.TEL_NO, g.IMG_PATH, g.REG_DATE ORDER BY g.REG_DATE DESC LIMIT #{cnt} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT g.GYM_CODE, g.GYM_NAME, g.ADDRESS, g.TEL_NO, g.IMG_PATH, COUNT(f.ID) AS FAVORITES_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_gym_favorites fav WHERE fav.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE AND fav.ID = #{ID} ) AS IS_FAVORITE FROM p014_gym g LEFT JOIN p014_gym_favorites f ON g.GYM_CODE = f.GYM_CODE
g.STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE'
(g.GYM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR g.ADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
GROUP BY g.GYM_CODE, g.GYM_NAME, g.ADDRESS, g.TEL_NO, g.IMG_PATH, g.REG_DATE ORDER BY FAVORITES_COUNT DESC, g.REG_DATE DESC LIMIT #{cnt} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM p014_gym g
g.STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE'
AND (g.GYM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR g.ADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))

SELECT GYM_CODE, GYM_NAME, ADDRESS, TEL_NO, DESCRIPTION, OWNER_ID, IMG_PATH, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_gym_favorites WHERE GYM_CODE = #{paramCode}) AS FAVORITES_COUNT FROM p014_gym WHERE GYM_CODE = #{paramCode};
SELECT gm.MACHINE_CODE, m.MACHINE_NAME, m.MACHINE_TARGET FROM p014_gym_machine gm JOIN p014_machine m ON gm.MACHINE_CODE = m.MACHINE_CODE WHERE gm.GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} ORDER BY gm.MACHINE_CODE ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_gym_favorites WHERE ID = #{ID} AND GYM_CODE = #{CODE};
INSERT INTO p014_gym_favorites (ID, GYM_CODE) VALUES (#{ID}, #{CODE})
DELETE FROM p014_gym_favorites WHERE ID = #{ID} AND GYM_CODE = #{CODE}

SELECT m.MARKET_NO, m.SELLER_ID AS ID, m.TITLE, m.PRICE, g.GYM_NAME, m.STATUS_CODE, DATEDIFF(m.END_DATE, NOW()) AS EXPIRY, u.PROFILE_PATH FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE JOIN p014_user u ON m.SELLER_ID = u.ID -- 사용자 테이블 JOIN
AND DATEDIFF(m.END_DATE, NOW()) >= 0
AND m.STATUS_CODE = 'SALE'
AND ( m.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR m.SELLER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR g.GYM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') )
ORDER BY
m.PRICE ASC, m.UPLOAD_DATE DESC
EXPIRY DESC, m.UPLOAD_DATE DESC
m.UPLOAD_DATE DESC
m.UPLOAD_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{cnt} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE
AND DATEDIFF(m.END_DATE, NOW()) >= 0
AND m.STATUS_CODE = 'SALE'
AND ( m.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR m.SELLER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR g.GYM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') )

SELECT m.TITLE, m.CONTENT, g.GYM_CODE, g.GYM_NAME, g.ADDRESS, m.SELLER_ID, u.PROFILE_PATH, m.PRICE, DATE_FORMAT(m.UPLOAD_DATE, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS UPLOAD_DATE, -- 업로드 시간은 유지 DATE_FORMAT(m.START_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS START_DATE, -- YYYYMMDD 형식으로 변경 DATE_FORMAT(m.END_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS END_DATE, -- YYYYMMDD 형식으로 변경 m.STATUS_CODE FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE JOIN p014_user u ON m.SELLER_ID = u.ID WHERE m.MARKET_NO = #{paramNo}

SELECT c.COMMENT_NO, c.PARENT_NO, c.WRITER_ID, u.PROFILE_PATH, c.CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(c.REG_DATE, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS REG_DATE FROM p014_market_comment c JOIN p014_user u ON c.WRITER_ID = u.ID WHERE c.MARKET_NO = #{paramNo} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.PARENT_NO, c.COMMENT_NO) DESC, c.PARENT_NO IS NULL DESC, c.REG_DATE ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO p014_market_comment ( MARKET_NO, PARENT_NO, WRITER_ID, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{MARKET_NO}, #{PARENT_NO}, #{WRITER_ID}, #{CONTENT} )

INSERT INTO p014_notification ( USER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, TARGET_NO ) SELECT CASE WHEN new_comment.PARENT_NO IS NOT NULL THEN parent_comment.WRITER_ID -- 부모 댓글 작성자에게 알림
ELSE market_post.SELLER_ID -- 게시글 작성자에게 알림 END,
CASE WHEN new_comment.PARENT_NO IS NOT NULL THEN 'NEW_REPLY' ELSE 'NEW_COMMENT' END,
new_comment.MARKET_NO
FROM p014_market_comment AS new_comment JOIN p014_market AS market_post ON new_comment.MARKET_NO = market_post.MARKET_NO LEFT JOIN p014_market_comment AS parent_comment ON new_comment.PARENT_NO = parent_comment.COMMENT_NO
WHERE new_comment.COMMENT_NO = #{newCommentNo} AND -- 자기 자신에게는 알림을 보내지 않도록 처리 (CASE WHEN new_comment.PARENT_NO IS NOT NULL THEN parent_comment.WRITER_ID ELSE market_post.SELLER_ID END) != new_comment.WRITER_ID
mapper.select: SELECT GYM_CODE, GYM_NAME, ADDRESS FROM p014_gym WHERE STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE';
mapper.update: UPDATE p014_market SET BUYER_ID = #{BUYER_ID}, SOLD_DATE = NOW(), STATUS_CODE = 'SOLD' WHERE MARKET_NO = #{MARKET_NO}
UPDATE p014_user SET NAME = #{NAME}, PW = #{PW}, PHONE_NO = #{PHONE_NO}, PROFILE_PATH = #{PROFILE_PATH} WHERE ID = #{ID}
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.UPLOAD_DATE DESC) AS NO, g.GYM_NAME, m.STATUS_CODE, m.MARKET_NO FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE WHERE m.SELLER_ID = #{paramID}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.SOLD_DATE DESC) AS NO, g.GYM_NAME, t.STATUS_CODE, m.MARKET_NO FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE LEFT JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO WHERE m.BUYER_ID = #{paramID}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_notification WHERE USER_ID = #{paramID} AND IS_READ = 'N'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC) AS NO, NOTI_TYPE, TARGET_NO, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, REG_DATE, NOW()) < 60 THEN '방금 전' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, REG_DATE, NOW()) < 60 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, REG_DATE, NOW()), '분 전') WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, REG_DATE, NOW()) < 24 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, REG_DATE, NOW()), '시간 전') WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, REG_DATE, NOW()) <= 7 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, REG_DATE, NOW()), '일 전') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%y.%m.%d %H:%i') END AS REG_DATE_STRING FROM p014_notification WHERE USER_ID = #{paramID} ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT GYM_CODE, GYM_NAME, ADDRESS, TEL_NO, DESCRIPTION, IMG_PATH FROM p014_gym WHERE OWNER_ID = #{OWNER_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE p014_gym SET GYM_NAME = #{GYM_NAME}, ADDRESS = #{ADDRESS}, TEL_NO = #{TEL_NO}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, IMG_PATH = #{IMG_PATH} WHERE GYM_CODE = #{GYM_CODE}

UPDATE p014_gym SET GYM_NAME = #{GYM_NAME}, ADDRESS = #{ADDRESS}, TEL_NO = #{TEL_NO}, DESCRIPTION = #{DESCRIPTION}, IMG_PATH = #{IMG_PATH}, STATUS_CODE = 'PENDING', REG_DATE = NOW() WHERE GYM_CODE = #{GYM_CODE}
mapper.select: SELECT m.MARKET_NO, DATE_FORMAT(m.SOLD_DATE, '%y.%m.%d %H:%i:%s') AS SOLD_DATE, t.STATUS_CODE, DATE_FORMAT(t.PROCESS_DATE, '%y.%m.%d %H:%i:%s') AS PROCESS_DATE, m.SELLER_ID, seller.NAME AS SELLER_NAME, -- 판매자 전화번호 포맷팅 CASE WHEN LENGTH(seller.PHONE_NO) = 11 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(seller.PHONE_NO, 1, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(seller.PHONE_NO, 4, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(seller.PHONE_NO, 8)) WHEN LENGTH(seller.PHONE_NO) = 10 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(seller.PHONE_NO, 1, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(seller.PHONE_NO, 4, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(seller.PHONE_NO, 7)) ELSE seller.PHONE_NO END AS SELLER_PHONE_NO, seller.PROFILE_PATH AS SELLER_PROFILE_PATH, m.BUYER_ID, buyer.NAME AS BUYER_NAME, -- 구매자 전화번호 포맷팅 CASE WHEN LENGTH(buyer.PHONE_NO) = 11 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(buyer.PHONE_NO, 1, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(buyer.PHONE_NO, 4, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(buyer.PHONE_NO, 8)) WHEN LENGTH(buyer.PHONE_NO) = 10 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(buyer.PHONE_NO, 1, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(buyer.PHONE_NO, 4, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(buyer.PHONE_NO, 7)) ELSE buyer.PHONE_NO END AS BUYER_PHONE_NO, buyer.PROFILE_PATH AS BUYER_PROFILE_PATH, (SELECT MESSAGE FROM p014_notification n WHERE n.TARGET_NO = m.MARKET_NO AND n.NOTI_TYPE = 'TRANSFER_REJECTED' LIMIT 1) AS REJECT_MESSAGE FROM p014_market m LEFT JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO LEFT JOIN p014_user seller ON m.SELLER_ID = seller.ID LEFT JOIN p014_user buyer ON m.BUYER_ID = buyer.ID WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} AND m.STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY m.SOLD_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE p014_membership_transfer SET STATUS_CODE = #{NEW_STATUS}, PROCESS_DATE = NOW() WHERE MARKET_NO = #{MARKET_NO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p014_notification ( USER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, TARGET_NO, MESSAGE ) VALUES ( #{USER_ID}, 'TRANSFER_REJECTED', #{MARKET_NO}, #{REJECT_MESSAGE} )
mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} AND t.STATUS_CODE = 'REQUESTED') AS PENDING_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market WHERE GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} AND STATUS_CODE = 'SALE') AS SALE_COUNT

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_user) AS TOTAL_USER_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market WHERE GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} AND UPLOAD_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED')) AS MONTHLY_POST_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_gym_favorites WHERE GYM_CODE = #{paramCode}) AS FAVORITE_COUNT

SELECT CONCAT(seller.NAME, ' 회원님 -> ', buyer.NAME, ' 회원님') AS TRANSFER_INFO FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO JOIN p014_user seller ON m.SELLER_ID = seller.ID JOIN p014_user buyer ON m.BUYER_ID = buyer.ID WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} AND t.STATUS_CODE = 'REQUESTED' ORDER BY m.SOLD_DATE DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT CONCAT( seller.NAME, ', ', buyer.NAME, ' 회원님의 요청 ', CASE WHEN t.STATUS_CODE = 'APPROVED' THEN '승인' WHEN t.STATUS_CODE = 'REJECTED' THEN '반려' END ) AS WORK_LOG_INFO FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO JOIN p014_user buyer ON m.BUYER_ID = buyer.ID JOIN p014_user seller ON m.SELLER_ID = seller.ID WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{paramCode} AND t.STATUS_CODE IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY t.PROCESS_DATE DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT GYM_NAME FROM p014_gym WHERE GYM_CODE = #{paramCode}

SELECT m.MACHINE_CODE, m.MACHINE_NAME, CASE WHEN owned.MACHINE_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_OWNED FROM p014_machine m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MACHINE_CODE FROM p014_gym_machine WHERE GYM_CODE = (SELECT GYM_CODE FROM p014_user WHERE ID = #{paramID}) ) AS owned ON m.MACHINE_CODE = owned.MACHINE_CODE ORDER BY m.MACHINE_NAME ASC
SELECT MACHINE_CODE, MACHINE_NAME, 'N' AS IS_OWNED FROM p014_machine ORDER BY MACHINE_NAME ASC
SELECT MESSAGE, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS REJECT_DATE FROM p014_notification WHERE TARGET_NO = #{paramCode} AND NOTI_TYPE = 'GYM_REGISTRATION_REJECTED' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT (SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) FROM p014_user) AS TOTAL_USER_COUNT,
(SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) FROM p014_user WHERE ROLE_TYPE = 'Admin') AS TOTAL_ADMIN_COUNT,
(SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) FROM p014_market WHERE STATUS_CODE = 'SALE') AS SALE_MARKET_COUNT,
(SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) FROM p014_user WHERE REG_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AS NEW_USER_COUNT_30D,
(SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) FROM p014_gym WHERE STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE' AND REG_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AS NEW_GYM_COUNT_30D
SELECT GYM_CODE, GYM_NAME, ADDRESS, TEL_NO, DESCRIPTION, OWNER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%y.%m.%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DATE, IMG_PATH FROM p014_gym WHERE STATUS_CODE = 'PENDING' ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE p014_gym SET STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE', REG_DATE = NOW() WHERE GYM_CODE = #{GYM_CODE}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p014_notification ( USER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, TARGET_NO, MESSAGE ) SELECT OWNER_ID, 'GYM_REGISTRATION_REJECTED', #{GYM_CODE}, #{REJECT_REASON} FROM p014_gym WHERE GYM_CODE = #{GYM_CODE}
mapper.select: SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) AS TOTAL_USER_COUNT FROM p014_user
SELECT FORMAT(COUNT(*), 0) AS TOTAL_GYM_COUNT FROM p014_gym WHERE STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%b') AS MONTH, COALESCE(COUNT(u.ID), 0) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-', n.num, '-01')) AS MONTH FROM ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 ) n WHERE n.num <= MONTH(NOW()) ) calendar LEFT JOIN p014_user u ON DATE_FORMAT(u.REG_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%Y-%m') AND YEAR(u.REG_DATE) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY calendar.MONTH ORDER BY calendar.MONTH ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%b') AS MONTH, COALESCE(COUNT(g.GYM_CODE), 0) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-', n.num, '-01')) AS MONTH FROM ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 ) n WHERE n.num <= MONTH(NOW()) ) calendar LEFT JOIN p014_gym g ON DATE_FORMAT(g.REG_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%Y-%m') AND g.STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE' AND YEAR(g.REG_DATE) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY calendar.MONTH ORDER BY calendar.MONTH ASC

SELECT g.GYM_NAME, COUNT(m.MARKET_NO) AS COUNT FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_gym g ON m.GYM_CODE = g.GYM_CODE WHERE m.STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED') AND m.SOLD_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) GROUP BY g.GYM_NAME ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market WHERE STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED') AND SOLD_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) AS CURRENT_MONTH_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market WHERE STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED') AND SOLD_DATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01') AND (NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ) AS PREVIOUS_MONTH_COUNT
SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS_CODE = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS APPROVAL_RATE FROM p014_membership_transfer WHERE STATUS_CODE IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED')
SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS_CODE = 'SOLD' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS SOLD_RATE FROM p014_market

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%b') AS MONTH, CAST(COALESCE(COUNT(t.PROCESS_DATE), 0) AS SIGNED) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-', n.num, '-01')) AS MONTH FROM ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 ) n WHERE n.num <= MONTH(NOW()) ) calendar LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.MARKET_NO, t.PROCESS_DATE FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{gymCode} AND t.STATUS_CODE = 'APPROVED' AND YEAR(t.PROCESS_DATE) = YEAR(NOW()) ) t ON DATE_FORMAT(t.PROCESS_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%Y-%m') GROUP BY calendar.MONTH ORDER BY calendar.MONTH ASC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market WHERE GYM_CODE = #{gymCode} AND STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED') AND SOLD_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) AS CURRENT_MONTH_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p014_market WHERE GYM_CODE = #{gymCode} AND STATUS_CODE IN ('SOLD', 'REJECTED') AND SOLD_DATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01') AND (NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ) AS PREVIOUS_MONTH_COUNT

SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN t.STATUS_CODE = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS APPROVAL_RATE FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{gymCode} AND t.STATUS_CODE IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%b') AS MONTH, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, m.SOLD_DATE, t.PROCESS_DATE) / 60), 0), 1) AS AVG_HOURS FROM ( SELECT DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-', n.num, '-01')) AS MONTH FROM ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 ) n WHERE n.num <= MONTH(NOW()) ) calendar LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.MARKET_NO, m.SOLD_DATE, t.PROCESS_DATE FROM p014_market m JOIN p014_membership_transfer t ON m.MARKET_NO = t.MARKET_NO WHERE m.GYM_CODE = #{gymCode} AND t.STATUS_CODE IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND YEAR(t.PROCESS_DATE) = YEAR(NOW()) ) t ON DATE_FORMAT(t.PROCESS_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(calendar.MONTH, '%Y-%m') LEFT JOIN p014_market m ON t.MARKET_NO = m.MARKET_NO GROUP BY calendar.MONTH ORDER BY calendar.MONTH DESC
SELECT MESSAGE FROM p014_notification WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND TARGET_NO = #{MARKET_NO} AND NOTI_TYPE = 'TRANSFER_REJECTED' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
